message:
feat(reactor): enhance LabReactor with deterministic event ordering

Adds missing features to complete LabReactor acceptance criteria:
- Add sequence numbers for deterministic same-time event ordering
- Add schedule_event() as alias for inject_event()
- Add set_ready() for immediate event delivery
- Add advance_time_to(target: Time) method
- Add 6 new tests verifying ordering and timing behavior

Events scheduled at the same virtual time are now delivered in
insertion order, ensuring deterministic test replay.

Closes: asupersync-vmj3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
